pi_items.source: Web search and APK analysis did not find Pharmacy as a standard built-in POI category in Sygic GPS. Standard categories are accommodation, restaurants, petrol stations, parking, attractions, etc. Pharmacy appears to be either custom or synthetic.
Web search and APK analysis did not find Health as a standard parent category in Sygic GPS. No healthcare-related parent categories found in documentation.
Verified in task.json description (line 5) and verifier.py logic (lines 65-70, 115-119). Task explicitly forbids keyboard text search and requires category browsing.
Verified in verifier.py (lines 71, 122, 139). Verifier checks for active navigation with turn-by-turn mode.

Web search confirmed Kabul, Afghanistan coordinates. Claimed coordinates are 34.535, actual coordinates are 34.52813 (difference ~0.007 degrees or ~600 meters). Values are approximately equal when rounded.

Web search confirmed Kabul, Afghanistan coordinates. Claimed coordinates are 69.172, actual coordinates are 69.17233 (difference ~0.0003 degrees or ~30 meters). Values match when rounded to 3 decimal places.

Google Play Store search confirmed Sygic GPS Navigation app with package name com.sygic.aura. APK file present in repo at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/sygic_gps_env/scripts/apks/com.sygic.aura.apk (154 MB).
Google Play Store official app name is 'Sygic GPS Navigation & Maps'. Official website https://www.sygic.com/gps-navigation.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves navigating to a pharmacy in Kabul, Afghanistan (coordinates approximately 34.535°N, 69.172°E - verified accurate within rounding) using the Sygic GPS Navigation app (package com.sygic.aura - verified as real app). The constraint forbids keyboard text search and requires using the category browser interface (verified in verifier.py). The expected final state is navigation_active with turn-by-turn mode (verified in verifier.py). However, Pharmacy and Health/Medical are not standard built-in POI categories in Sygic GPS according to official documentation. Standard categories include accommodation, restaurants, petrol stations, and parking. The pharmacy category appears to be either custom or synthetic for this task. No evidence of Pharmacy data for Afghanistan was found in the app's preloaded POI database.
